Verified against task description and export_result.sh paths.
Verified against verifier.py expectation 'if len(unique_pairs) >= 3' and VLM prompt requirements.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real, multi-frame X-Ray Angiography (XA) sample downloaded from Rubo Medical (0002.DCM), despite the task description referring to it as a 'trauma CT'. The output paths for the window_levels.txt and trauma_layout.png files, as well as the requirement for 3 distinct panels, match the export and verifier scripts.
